# artist - The Knack

## genres
- New Wave

## albums
**Get The Knack (1979) – Debut Album** : Recorded for Capitol Records on a modest budget of $18,000, the album was completed in only two weeks. Released on June 11, 1979, it sold 1 million copies by June 24, making it Capitol's fastest-selling debut since The Beatles in 1964. ← https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bYsV3ozbk4M

## curiosities
**Economic Industry Impact** : The "astounding" profits generated by the band's debut proved to record labels that New Wave could be a path out of the late-70s economic downturn. However, the band faced a severe industry backlash due to their rapid success, and American radio skepticism often hindered the traction of their subsequent work. ← https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bYsV3ozbk4M
